title: Electronic Devices
description: Mod that adds electronic decoration stuff
body:
# **Electronic Devices Mod (EDM) - bring the look of modern technology into Minecraft!**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

EDM focuses on high-quality electronic-themed decorations that perfectly complete modern builds. From monitors and screens to various every-day use elements, every block is designed to make your interiors feel more believable and immersive.


What you get:
- Realistic electronic-themed decorations
- Monitors, screens, and modern tech props
- Clean, consistent style that fits modern builds
- Perfect for offices, gaming rooms, studios, kitchens, and more
- Lightweight — no complex systems, just pure aesthetics

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Is there anything you would like to see added to this mod? Or maybe you have found a bug? Join our discord and get into our community!**
[discord](https://discord.gg/YqFxSDJkPJ)

**For more specific info or to check on upcoming updates we encourage you to check out our website at:**
[https://cookiecraftmods.com](https://cookiecraftmods.com/)

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
